english translation text: Mujrae khalq mein in ankhon ne kya kya dekhaPar kahin sibte payambar sa na aqa dekhaFrom amongst these people, O what did these eyes see?But never a Master like the Prophet’s grandson did they see.

Meine Dekha Alame Shah Ko Aluda Ba-khoonMeine Abbas Ko Bejan Labe Darya Dekha I Saw That My Lord’s Banner Splattered With BloodBy The Banks Of The Flowing River, The Lifeless Body Of Abbas I Saw

urdu transliteration text: Meine Dekha Ali Asghar Ka Gala Khoon Me TarMeine Zakhmi Ali Akbar Ka Kaleja Dekha I Saw The Neck Of Ali Asghar, Moistened By Its Own BloodMortally Wounded, The Heart Of Ali Akbar I Saw

english translation text: Aik Ghatri Shah-e-deen Phusht Pe Laaye Usme,  Mai Ne Tukdre Huwe Qasim Ka Saraapa Dekha.   There Was A Bundle That The King Of The Faith (Imam) Carried Upon His Back; And In ItI Saw The Body Of Qasim, From Head To Toe, In Chopped Pieces

Ghir Pare Sibte Nabi Thaam Ke Haathon Se Jigaar, Ali Akbar Ko Jo Reti Pe Tardpta Dekha.   The Grandson Of The Prophet Fell Upon The Ground, With His Hands Clasping His HeartWhen He Saw Ali Akbar, Writhing On The Sands

urdu transliteration text: Kehti Thi Zainab-e-muztar Kay Khuda Khair KareRaat Ko Khwaab Mein Uriyan Sar-e-zahra Dekha Said The Woeful Zainab By God, May All Be WellLast Night,  In My Dreams  Zahra Without Her Veil I Saw

english translation text: Jaake Zainab Ne Madine Mei Kaha Sughra SeKaho Kiss Muse Ke Pardes Mei Kya Kya Dekha Said Zainab Unto Sughra Upon Her Return To MadinaHow Can I Possibly Narrate In The Foreign Land (I.E. Karbala) What We Saw
